lines.text: ...Excuse me, did you drop this USB drive?

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: Oh! Yes! Thank you so much...
Haha, you look panicked. Is something important on it?

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: My entire OS assignment... You literally saved my life.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: I'm Mei. See you around, EECS boy.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Heh. Bold. Maybe if you can impress everyone around me first — my professor, my dad... even the campus dog.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Come find me near the fountain when you're done. I'll be watching. 💕

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: ...Okay then. Bye.

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: (She walked away. I should've said something better...)

lines.speaker: Prof. Chen
lines.text: So you want to court my student? Logic first, feelings later.

lines.speaker: Prof. Chen
lines.text: Solve my circuit challenges before the timer runs out. Begin!

lines.speaker: Prof. Chen
lines.text: ...Acceptable. You understand logic gates. Perhaps you are worthy after all.

lines.speaker: Prof. Chen
lines.text: Take this Heart Fragment. She'll hear about your performance.

lines.speaker: Prof. Chen
lines.text: Pathetic. Your logic is unsound. Come back when you've studied.

lines.speaker: Bystander
lines.text: Watch out! Niu Pai is loose near the pond again!

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: I just need to get through to meet Mei's dad...

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: Made it through! Sorry Niu Pai, no hard feelings.

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: (She seems to like me though... maybe I should bring treats next time.)

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: So YOU'RE the boy who's been bothering my daughter.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: I'll judge your sincerity by what you catch — and what you dodge. Ready?

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: Hmph. Good reflexes. I'll allow it — for now.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: Don't make her cry, or you'll answer to me.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: You can't even catch sincerity when it's thrown at you. Go home.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: You actually made it past everyone. I'm... impressed.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: But there's one more thing. I want to know if we're truly in sync.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Feel my heartbeat. Match it. If you can — I'll know you're the one.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Heh. Confident. I like it. Ready when you are. ♥

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Just breathe. I'll be right here.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Our hearts are already in sync. ♥

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: (I think I'm going to be okay.)

slides.title: TRUE LOVE ENDING
slides.body:
You collected all Heart Fragments and proved yourself to everyone.

Mei turns to you with a warm smile...

"I heard everything you did. The professor, my dad, even Niu Pai likes you now."

"...I like you too, EECS boy."

*She leans in and gives you a gentle kiss on the cheek.*

💗 Your heart.exe has been installed.

slides.title: CONGRATULATIONS!
slides.body:
LOVE.EXE — Complete!

Thank you for playing. ♥

Group 23 | SS2026 NTHU

slides.title: FRIEND ZONE ENDING
slides.body:
You did well, but something was missing...

Mei smiles warmly and extends her hand.

"You're a really good person. Let's be friends!"

*You smile and nod, hiding your disappointment.*

...At least you have Niu Pai.

slides.title: REJECTED ENDING
slides.body:
You didn't manage to impress anyone...

Mei shakes her head gently.

"I'm sorry... I don't think this will work out."

*Maybe try a little harder next time.*

...You walk home alone in the rain.

slides.title: NIU PAI ENDING 🐕 (Easter Egg!)
slides.body: You fed Niu Pai so many times that you completely forgot why you came to campus.

Niu Pai follows you everywhere now.

"Woof!" — Translation: "You complete me."

*ACHIEVEMENT UNLOCKED: Best Dog Dad*

...Who needs romance when you have unconditional love?

slides.title: EECS OVERLOAD ENDING (Easter Egg!)
slides.body:
You aced every mini-game with perfect scores.

But you never once said anything romantic to Mei.

You graduate with the highest honors in EECS history.

...Still single.

> GPA: 4.0
> Girlfriend: NULL
> Happiness: undefined

*ACHIEVEMENT UNLOCKED: 4.0 GPA, 0 Dates.*

slides.title: 🌟 SECRET ENDING 🌟
slides.body:
You found the hidden bush in the corner of campus.

A mysterious glowing figure steps out...

???: "You're the first player to find me. I've been waiting."

"As a reward — I'll tell you the truth about LOVE.EXE:"

"...It was all a game. But the feelings? Those were real."

✨ Congratulations, True Explorer.
